modes.name: classifier-mode
modes.triggered_when: spec.outputSchema set AND tools[] empty/absent; OR outputSchema absent AND tools[] empty/absent (text-format variant — no phantom tool; raw text return)
modes.dispatch_shape: Single LLM call. When outputSchema set: forced phantom-tool toolChoice constrains output to structured payload per the verdict-shaped schema. When outputSchema absent: free-form text output; no phantom tool registered.
modes.output_form: Schema-validated typed result (when outputSchema set) OR raw text return. Returned as TypedResult.
use_cases: Monitor classify calls (CLEAN / FLAG / NEW verdict-shaped output)
Workflow agent steps requiring structured output
Any agent dispatch where the operator-direction is 'transform input X into structured output Y'

modes.name: agentic-mode
modes.triggered_when: spec.tools[] non-empty AND outputSchema absent (DEC-0009); OR tools[] non-empty AND outputSchema set (agentic-mode wins; outputSchema becomes post-hoc validation). output.format is informational; does not alter mode selection.
modes.dispatch_shape: Multi-turn dispatch loop. Declared tools[] must be a subset of dispatch.parentGrant per DEC-0011; otherwise executeAgent throws GrantViolationError before LLM dispatch. The allowed compiled ToolDefinitions become the LLM's tool registry. Loop: (1) call LLM; (2) if response contains tool calls, execute each by invoking the matching compiled ToolDefinition.execute(toolCallId, params, signal, onUpdate, ctx) per DEC-0008/DEC-0010, passing ExtensionContext as ctx, and append results to message history; (3) call LLM again with enriched history; (4) repeat until end_turn or max-turns or tool-failure. Phantom-tool not used.
modes.output_form: Final assistant message after the tool-execution loop terminates. When outputSchema is also set, the final message is validated against it post-hoc.
use_cases: clock-menu-app's spec-requirements-miner / spec-issues-miner / spec-decisions-drafter (tool-using agents authored against tools: [read, append-block-item])
Any agent dispatch where the operator-direction is 'do the work using these tools'
